nodes.context: Sinti-origin mafia organization operating in Rome and Lazio, involved in extortion, drug trafficking, and other crimes.
Roman criminal organization that allied with the Casamonica clan from the 1970s to the 1990s.
Rival clan eliminated by the Casamonica clan and Banda della Magliana in the late 1970s-early 1980s.
Calabrian mafia organization that allied with the Casamonica clan, providing drugs and protection.
Neapolitan mafia organization that allied with the Casamonica clan, providing drugs and protection.
Sinti family affiliated with the Casamonica clan, involved in criminal activities.
Sinti family affiliated with the Casamonica clan, involved in criminal activities.

edges.context: Allied from the 1970s to the 1990s; Casamonica provided manpower in exchange for profit share and power consolidation.
Casamonica and Banda della Magliana eliminated the Proietti clan in the late 1970s-early 1980s.
Allied since the 1990s; 'Ndrangheta provides drugs and protection to the Casamonica clan.
Allied since the 1990s; Camorra provides drugs and protection to the Casamonica clan.
Spada clan is an affiliated Sinti family allied with the Casamonica clan.
Di Silvio clan is an affiliated Sinti family allied with the Casamonica clan.
